summary: Frontend-only verification of /admin refactor (container Admin.jsx + 6 sub-components). Executed full E2E flow via Playwright against public URL. All data-testids preserved and rendering correctly; all interactions (login, dashboard sections, add/toggle/delete sponsor, header actions, logout) work identically to the pre-refactor version. No regressions found.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: Admin.jsx (359 lines) is a pure container holding state/handlers; 6 sub-components under /components/admin/ receive props. Zero behavior change verified.
All data-testids from original file are preserved verbatim (verified via live DOM lookup).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test sponsor 'TEST_Sponsor_Refactor' during flow and deleted it via UI at end of test — no residual data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin refactor verified. Full flow tested: login → verify 18 dashboard testids → add sponsor (name, cuisine, category select, price select) → toggle active off/on → delete (with window.confirm accepted) → logout → back to login card. All PASS.

detailed_results.login: PASS — admin-login-card renders, password input + login button → dashboard
detailed_results.add_sponsor: PASS — created sponsor with id f48717a1-..., success toast displayed
detailed_results.delete_sponsor: PASS — window.confirm accepted, sponsor row removed
